security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: A Fleet-like PHP-focused desktop code editor.
bundle.longDescription: Mockor Editor is a lightweight desktop code editor with a fast basic editing loop and optional PHP project intelligence.
